verdict_reason: P1 manifest integrity and audit-trail failures: the staged manifest is bound to the wrong task identity, omits required red-team manifest fields/evidence links, contains a non-executable test command, is future-dated, and the supplied empty diff hash does not match the staged manifest-only change observed in git.

findings.description: Manifest self-identifies as task_id "0.5" while the reviewed acceptance-matrix substrate id and required verdict task_id are "0_5_stub_substrate"; the authoritative manifest path outputs/audits/manifests/0_5_stub_substrate.json is absent, so U1 task identity binding fails.

Manifest omits required U7 fields from .codex/codex_red_team_checklist.md, including phase, started_at, estimate_hours, changed_files, artifacts, open_bugs, evidence_links, codex_findings_addressed, and walkthrough_artifact; this also leaves U2/U8 evidence and open-bug coverage unbound.
test_commands contains the non-executable entry "deferred - requires OVH BHS H200 cluster online", so not all listed test commands can return 0 in CI as required by U5.
completed_at is 2026-05-03T06:30:00Z, which is after this review timestamp, making the completion attestation future-dated.

The brief-provided diff_sha256 is the empty SHA-256, but git diff --cached --numstat shows 113 added lines for outputs/audits/manifests/0.5.json; the verdict would not cryptographically bind to the staged content reviewed.
